hero.title:
From Story
to Business.
hero.subtitle: Your imagination, on a bigger stage. From planning and production to global distribution and monetization — WEAVUS walks the full journey with you.

items.title: One seamless workflow
items.desc: Webtoons, print manga, illustration, localization, and distribution — all designed as one unified flow.

items.title: Flexible production, your way
items.desc: Full production or just the process you need — planning, art, localization — it's up to you.

items.title: Fast, reliable delivery
items.desc: Built on extensive production experience and a partner network that delivers consistent quality on schedule.

services.title: Our Services
services.subtitle: You just need an idea. Reach out for any kind of consultation.

items.label: WEBTOON
items.title: Webtoon Planning / Production
items.desc: We can handle the full production pipeline or just the processes you need.

items.label: LOCALIZATION
items.title: Content Localization
items.desc: We localize webtoons, novels, ads and more to meet global standards.

items.label: DISTRIBUTION
items.title: Distribution / Partnership
items.desc: We distribute content to major platforms, primarily in Japan, Korea, and China.

items.label: WEBSITE
items.title: Website Planning / Development
items.desc: We build websites that accurately convey the value of content and products.

items.label: ILLUSTRATION
items.title: Illustration
items.desc: High-quality illustrations tailored to your purpose.

items.label: MANGA
items.title: Print Manga Production
items.desc: From planning to completion of graphic novels and print manga.

works.title:
Creating Impact
Worldwide.
works.subtitle: Proven performance on global platforms — turning single stories into worldwide businesses.

cta.title:
From Story to Business.
Let's design it together.
cta.subtitle: Your idea, let's bring it to life right now.

servicesPage.title: Services
servicesPage.subtitle: Anchored on webtoon production and global localization, delivered end-to-end.
servicesPage.processSubtitle: From concept to serialization — one managed pipeline.

process.title: Kickoff / Fandom Research
process.desc: IP analysis, references, and fandom insights

process.title: Planning & Script
process.desc: Season structure, episode beats, key-scene design

process.title: Art / Coloring
process.desc: Parallel storyboard, lineart, and color in partner studios

portfolioPage.title: Portfolio
portfolioPage.subtitle: A lineup of fandom IP proven in global markets.

aboutPage.title: About
aboutPage.subtitle: WEAVUS CONTENT is the content maker closest to K-culture fandoms.
aboutPage.mission: Turn fandom voices into stories, and stories into every language.
aboutPage.vision: The global No.1 fandom content studio — expanding artist universes into webtoon and story IP worldwide.

contactPage.title: Contact
contactPage.subtitle: Share your project for webtoon production, localization, or partnership — we reply within 2 business days.

heroLead: Dreams are better when they sound a little crazy.
We move beyond common sense — turning imagination into reality.
WEAVUS is built on one mission: create the defining content of this century,
and stand with creators at full commitment.
Let's give form to the world you want to draw — together with WEAVUS.
creators.processSubtitle: Document review → Portfolio review → Matching → Contract → Serialization. We reply within 3 weeks.

process.title: Submit application
process.desc: Share your portfolio URL and basic info.

process.title: Document · portfolio review
process.desc: Our team responds within 3 weeks with a decision.

process.title: Matching
process.desc: Selected creators register as 'WEAVUS Creators' and get matched to projects.

process.title: Launch / Monetization
process.desc: From global platform serialization to IP expansion.

looking.title: Character illustration
looking.desc: Character art with a sense of panel flow for webtoon & manga.

looking.title: Line / sketch
looking.desc: Rough and line art showing proportion, pose, and expression.

looking.title: Background art
looking.desc: Landscapes, architecture, interiors — specialty background work.

looking.title: Color / finishing
looking.desc: Color, effects, and finish polish applied over other artists' line art.

creators.formSubtitle: Just a portfolio URL and a few details — we'll respond within 3 business weeks.

form.name: Name / handle
form.introPlaceholder: Tell us about your practice, experience, and the genres you love.
form.success: Application received — we'll reply within 3 business weeks.
form.required: Please fill in the required fields.

notices: Your portfolio continues to be a reference even after the initial review.
Accepted applicants register as 'WEAVUS Creators' and are contacted when a project matches.
All work is offered as freelance (業務委託) contracts.
Minors must submit a guardian consent form.
This form is for individual creators only. For company inquiries, see below.
creators.businessBody: Production houses, studios, and companies — please reach out via the official Contact page. Using this form may delay our response.
